headline: Is It Time To Reassess Northern Trust (NTRS) After Its Strong 40% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Northern Trust's current share price reflects its true worth, starting with a clear view of its recent performance and valuation checks can help ground your expectations. The stock closed at US$134.99 recently, with a 1 year return of 40.3% alongside shorter term returns of a 1.6% decline over 7 days, a 5.7% decline over 30 days and a 3.1% decline year to date. Recent coverage has focused on how a strong multi year share price record now sits against more muted...

headline: Why Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) is a Great Dividend Stock Right Now
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Northern Trust (NTRS) have what it takes? Let's find out.
